notes: Every user-configurable setting in inventories/*.settings-entry.json. Vars: default (the default value), scope (user|workspace|device).

steps.title: Implement {name} setting
steps.description: Add {name} to the settings surface at {path}: typed storage ({scope} scope), default `{default}`, live effect without restart where feasible, migration for existing users.
acceptance_criteria: changing it takes effect as specified

steps.title: Validate and bound {name} values
steps.description: Reject/clamp invalid values of {name} (corrupted storage, manual edits); the product must behave sanely for any stored value.
acceptance_criteria: corrupted value falls back to default with telemetry, not a crash
